ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timers" (
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the timer */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Initial reset value of the timer */,
  "rw_access" TEXT /* Read/Write access type (e.g., RW, RO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the timer's function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clock_sources" (
  "clock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clock source */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this clock source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the clock source */,
  "source_value" TEXT /* Value representing the clock source selection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clock source operation */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the clock source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clock_sources_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the timer state record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this state belongs to */,
  "is_running" INTEGER /* Indicates if the timer is currently running */,
  "clear_state" INTEGER /* Indicates if the timer is in a clear state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_states_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polarity_settings" (
  "polarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the polarity setting */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this polarity setting belongs to */,
  "polarity_type" TEXT /* Type of polarity (e.g., NORMAL, INVERTED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polarity setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polarity_settings_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reset configuration */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this reset configuration belongs to */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Value used for resetting the timer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reset operation */,
  "auto_reset" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reset is automatic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_resets_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this log entry corresponds to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., configuration, state change) */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_logs_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this performance record belongs to */,
  "average_execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time of the timer */,
  "max_execution_time" REAL /* Maximum execution time of the timer */,
  "min_execution_time" REAL /* Minimum execution time of the timer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_performance_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the optimization record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this optimization record belongs to */,
  "optimization_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization (e.g., frequency adjustment, duty cycle adjustment) */,
  "optimization_value" TEXT /* Value of the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_optimization_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the integration record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this integration record belongs to */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., hardware integration, software integration) */,
  "integration_value" TEXT /* Value of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_integration_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_documentation" (
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the documentation record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this documentation record belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_documentation_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timer_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance record */,
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timer this compliance record belongs to */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., regulatory compliance, industry compliance) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timer_compliance_timer_id FOREIGN KEY ("timer_id") REFERENCES timers ("timer_id")
)
